name: Initialize SDK
description: Initialize the SDK singleton for the current process. Must be called exactly once before any transaction APIs.
details: Configures transports, logging, cloud mode, and default timeout. Calling init more than once will result in an error.

bodyParams.name: exclusive_transport
bodyParams.description: Disables fallback when set. Overrides transport_preference.

bodyParams.name: log_level
bodyParams.description: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR.

bodyParams.name: cloud_result_mode
bodyParams.description: Cloud polling behavior: MANUAL_POLL or AUTO.
